topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)
keyPointsSummary: 'Wish/If only' + past simple expresses a wish about present unreal situations
'Wish/If only' + past perfect expresses regret about past events (things that didn't happen)
'Wish/If only' + would + base verb expresses wanting someone else to change behavior

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
quickQuiz.answer: I wish I had more money.

quickQuiz.hindi: काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
quickQuiz.answer: If only I had more money.

quickQuiz.hindi: काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।
quickQuiz.answer: If only I had studied earlier.

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने यह गलती नहीं की होती।
quickQuiz.answer: I wish I had not made this mistake.
I wish you would calm down.
If only the weather were good.

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने उससे बात की होती।
quickQuiz.answer: I wish I had talked to him.

quickQuiz.hindi: काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।
quickQuiz.answer: If only I had known this earlier.

mustRememberRules: 'Wish/If only' + past simple expresses a wish about present unreal situations
'Wish/If only' + past perfect expresses regret about past events (things that didn't happen)
'Wish/If only' + would + base verb expresses wanting someone else to change behavior
